metadata.title: Excel Sequence Formula Generator - SEQUENCE and ROW Formulas
metadata.description: Generate Excel sequence formulas for labels, row numbers, IDs, and CSV previews. Includes Excel 365 SEQUENCE and legacy ROW formulas.

hero.title: Excel sequence formula generator
hero.description: Build copy-ready SEQUENCE and ROW formulas for Excel labels, IDs, row numbers, and repeated spreadsheet tasks.

announcement.title: Modern Excel 365 and older Excel patterns in one place

intent.title: Choose the formula pattern that matches your Excel version
intent.description: Excel 365 users can use SEQUENCE. Older workbooks often need a ROW-based formula. The generator gives both so you can copy the safer fit.

items.title: SEQUENCE formula
items.description: Use dynamic arrays for modern Excel where a single formula can spill into many rows.

items.title: ROW formula
items.description: Use a classic formula pattern when dynamic arrays are not available.

items.title: TEXT padding
items.description: Add zero padding automatically when values need Account0001 style formatting.

workflow.title: How the formula is built
workflow.description: The inputs map directly to Excel formula parts.

items.title: Prefix and separator
items.description: These become the text before each generated number.

items.title: Start, rows, and step
items.description: These control the numeric sequence in SEQUENCE or ROW.

items.title: Padding
items.description: When padding is enabled, the formula wraps the number in TEXT.

related.title: Related formula use cases
related.description: Use the same generator for several common spreadsheet jobs.

items.title: Account labels
items.description: Generate Account1, Account2, and account import IDs.

items.title: Autofill without dragging
items.description: Avoid dragging the fill handle through thousands of rows.

items.title: Bulk row labels
items.description: Create row labels for operations, exports, and reports.

items.question: What if my Excel does not support SEQUENCE?
items.answer: Use the legacy ROW formula from the generator instead.

items.question: Can the formula include text before the number?
items.answer: Yes. The prefix and separator are included before the generated number.

items.question: Can I copy fixed values instead of a formula?
items.answer: Yes. Use the plain-text or CSV preview for a fixed-value sample.

cta.title: Build your Excel sequence formula
cta.description: Use the generator to create both modern and legacy formula options.
